title: Death Stone
description: Die, locate, return — death just got a little less permanent !
body:
![th](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9eac867e1c4e48a1faa1e91451868dcdee94927e_0.webp)

#### _**MicroPack** is a collection of lightweight mod/datapack that adds tiny, focused features to vanilla Minecraft._

# How It Works

Every time you die, a mysterious ***Death Stone** appears in your inventory*.

- Hold it in your hand to see exactly where your life ended: **dimension**, **coordinates**, and even the **distance** from your current spot.

- Right-click, if you have at least 2 XP levels, to teleport to that location.

- Shift + right-click to destroy the stone.

## Uninstalling
1. Access the Chat Window.
2. Enter the Uninstall Command and press Enter: 
`
/function death_stone:uninstall
`
